title: Formulas and General Castor
excerpt:
This formula works in Monday formula column but not in general castor - anyone able to help? 
IF(AND({Work Email}, {Personal Email}), {Work Email}, IF({Work Email}, {Work Email}, IF({Personal Email}, {Personal Email}, “”…

posts.author: cynbastos (Cyn Bastos)
posts.cookedHtml:
This formula works in Monday formula column but not in general castor - anyone able to help?

IF(AND({Work Email}, {Personal Email}), {Work Email}, IF({Work Email}, {Work Email}, IF({Personal Email}, {Personal Email}, “”)))
